title: SQL Server Query Plan Regression
description: Detect and resolve query plan regressions using Query Store — identifies the last known good plan and recommends forcing it
author: A. Pogaku

qs_regressed_queries.description: Query Store regressed queries — queries whose performance degraded recently

interactive_hints.qs_plan_comparison: Run to see the before/after execution plans for the top regressed query — shows exactly what changed and why performance degraded
interactive_hints.qs_plan_forcing_candidates: Run to identify which regressed queries are safe candidates for plan forcing
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

qs_plan_comparison.description: Side-by-side plan comparison — last known good vs current bad plan

interactive_hints.qs_stats_change_timeline: Run to confirm whether a statistics update triggered the plan change — pinpoints the root cause
interactive_hints.qs_plan_forcing_candidates: Run to identify the last good plan_id and generate the sp_query_store_force_plan command
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if the plan comparison is sufficient for your diagnosis

qs_stats_change_timeline.description: Statistics update history correlated with query performance degradation

interactive_hints.qs_plan_forcing_candidates: Run to generate the plan forcing command now that the root cause is confirmed — provides the immediate fix
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if timeline confirmation is sufficient
interactive_hints.switch_to_sqlserver-stale-statistics: Switch to the Stale Statistics playbook to run a full staleness scan and histogram inspection across all affected tables — reveals the broader impact beyond this one query and generates UPDATE STATISTICS commands for the permanent fix alongside the plan force

qs_plan_forcing_candidates.description: Plan forcing candidates with sp_query_store_force_plan commands

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with the plan forcing recommendation
interactive_hints.switch_to_sqlserver-stale-statistics: Switch to the Stale Statistics playbook to run the full staleness scan — the plan force is the immediate fix, but the statistics rebuild is the permanent fix and may reveal other affected tables and queries beyond this one
